subtitles.original: はい！というわけで
subtitles.english: Alright, everyone!

subtitles.original: 始まりましたー！
subtitles.english: It has finally begun!

subtitles.original: 風真いろは生誕ライブ2026
subtitles.english: Kazama Iroha Birthday Live 2026...

subtitles.original: スタート！
subtitles.english: ...starts now!

subtitles.original: みんな、こんばんはー！見えてる？
subtitles.english: Good evening, everyone! Can you see me?

subtitles.original: はい、ということで本日のハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: Alright, and here is today's hashtag!

subtitles.original: こちらね、みんな、いっぱいポストしていっぱいカッコいいとこ撮ってくださいね。頼むよ！
subtitles.english: Please use this hashtag, post a lot, and take tons of cool screenshots of me. I'm counting on you!

subtitles.original: この風真いろはがイケメンであることを世の中に知らしめられるのは、
subtitles.english: The only ones who can let the world know...

subtitles.original: お前たちだけ、お前たちだけなので、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...how cool Kazama Iroha is are you guys, so I'm counting on you!

subtitles.original: はい、そして今回のライブ、タイトルがついております。
subtitles.english: Also, this concert has a title.

subtitles.original: 「Wind Trails」というタイトルがついておりますが、
subtitles.english: It's titled "Wind Trails."

subtitles.original: そのまま訳して結構お気づきの方も多かったんですが、
subtitles.english: Many of you probably figured out the literal translation,

subtitles.original: 風の軌跡という、あの、意味を込めて付けさせていただき、
subtitles.english: but it carries the meaning of "trail of the wind."

subtitles.original: 今回ライブ、いろいろ頑張って、考えさせていただきました。
subtitles.english: I put a lot of hard work and thought into planning this concert.

subtitles.original: なのでね、最後まで楽しんでもらえると嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: So, I hope you enjoy it until the very end.

subtitles.original: そして1曲目ね、「かくれんぼ」、歌わせていただきました！どうだったかなー？
subtitles.english: And for the first song, I sang "Kakurenbo"! How did you like it?

subtitles.original: そして、今日、室内ライブだと思ったでしょ？
subtitles.english: Also, you thought this was an indoor concert today, right?

subtitles.original: 見て！
subtitles.english: Take a look!

subtitles.original: 曲中にドームが開きましたー！イェーイ！すごい！
subtitles.english: The dome opened during the song! Yay! That was amazing!

subtitles.original: やっぱりね、なかなか現地ライブって、できてもさ、青空の下で
subtitles.english: Real-life concerts don't often give us the chance...

subtitles.original: なかなか歌ってることがないので、
subtitles.english: ...to sing beneath the open blue sky.

subtitles.original: いつか俺たちとお前たちの次元が交わって、空の下で歌えるような世界が
subtitles.english: Maybe one day our dimensions will cross, and a world where we can sing together under the sky...

subtitles.original: 来るかもしれないけど、やってみたくてね。今回は、
subtitles.english: ...will come, but I really wanted to try it, so this time,

subtitles.original: 空の下で歌うっていうこの演出をやらせていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: I wanted to perform this staging where I sing under the sky!

subtitles.original: めっちゃいいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Isn't it so great?

subtitles.original: ステージもめっちゃかっこいいんで、
subtitles.english: The stage is also super cool,

subtitles.original: 今日はね、たぶんいっぱい見る機会あると思いますが、
subtitles.english: so you'll have plenty of chances to see it today.

subtitles.original: ゆっくり隅から隅まで。アーカイブ勢もきっといると思うんで、
subtitles.english: Take your time looking at every corner. I'm sure the archive-watchers will too,

subtitles.original: 本当にいろんな細部こだわってるんで、細かく見てくださいね。
subtitles.english: because we really paid attention to every detail, so look closely!

subtitles.original: ということで、
subtitles.english: Anyway...

subtitles.original: お水飲んでいいですかね？
subtitles.english: Can I drink some water?

subtitles.original: お水を、お、うっ、やめろ！
subtitles.english: Let me get some water... Whoa, wait, stop!

subtitles.original: 俺の頭をいじ...うっ、やめっ
subtitles.english: Don't touch my head... Ugh, stop that-

subtitles.original: 頭をいじくり回されて、ヘッドセットになりました。
subtitles.english: They messed with my head, and now I'm using a headset.

subtitles.original: そして、水が、お水、用意してくれたんだよね。
subtitles.english: And they prepared some water for me.

subtitles.original: みんなに見える水！
subtitles.english: Water that all of you can actually see!

subtitles.original: うまい！
subtitles.english: So good!

subtitles.original: うますぎる！この、この振りはちょっと怒られそうだからもうできないけど、うますぎる！
subtitles.english: Too delicious! I might get scolded if I do this pose again, but it's so good!

subtitles.original: うまいなー。
subtitles.english: Ah, that hits the spot.

subtitles.original: これで、あと1時間やるか？そういうわけにはいかないんで、
subtitles.english: Should I just do this for another hour? I can't do that,

subtitles.original: 一回ちょっと返して...
subtitles.english: so let me put this away...

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、
subtitles.english: Well then,

subtitles.original: 水分補給もさせてもらって、息も整ったんじゃない？
subtitles.english: now that I've hydrated and caught my breath,

subtitles.original: はい、次の曲、早速やっていきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: I'd like to get right into the next song!

subtitles.original: それでは次の曲、聴いてください。
subtitles.english: Now, please listen to the next song.

subtitles.original: 「白線」
subtitles.english: "Hakusen"

subtitles.original: 澄み渡った空に白線
subtitles.english: A white line in the clear blue sky...

subtitles.original: あの地平を超えて
subtitles.english: ...beyond that horizon!

subtitles.original: はい！はい！はい！はい！もっと！はい！はい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! More! Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: 始まりはちょっと軽い期待で その欠片そっとポケットしまって
subtitles.english: It started with light expectations, tucking those pieces gently into my pocket

subtitles.original: 屋上 遠い空の向こうを見てた
subtitles.english: On the rooftop, looking beyond the distant sky

subtitles.original: この足でどこに行けるかなって わかってないけどわかってるんだ
subtitles.english: Wondering where these feet can take me, I don't know, but yet I do

subtitles.original: 白昼 淡い月に手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: Reaching my hand out to the pale moon in broad daylight

subtitles.original: 掠れたエコー でも答えはもう 初めからちゃんと持っていたんだよ
subtitles.english: A faded echo, but I already had the answer right from the start

subtitles.original: メイビー この想いは
subtitles.english: Maybe this feeling...

subtitles.original: メイビー この想いは
subtitles.english: Maybe this feeling...

subtitles.original: マスビー 熱を増して
subtitles.english: Must be, heating up...

subtitles.original: マスビー 熱を増して
subtitles.english: Must be, heating up...

subtitles.original: ほらね、飛べるんだ
subtitles.english: See? I can fly!

subtitles.original: もっと高く 高く 高くまで 羽ばたいてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to flap my wings and go higher, higher, even higher

subtitles.original: 今日に未来色の軌道描いて 地平の先まで
subtitles.english: Drawing a future-colored trail in today, all the way to the horizon

subtitles.original: 届かない歌はない 迷いはもうない
subtitles.english: There is no song that won't reach, I have no doubts anymore

subtitles.original: どんな世界も瞬間も揺るがない 愛が在るから
subtitles.english: Unwavering in any world, at any moment, because love exists

subtitles.original: 澄み渡った空に白線
subtitles.english: A white line in the clear blue sky

subtitles.original: 不安と期待とアンビバレント
subtitles.english: Anxiety, expectation, and ambivalence

subtitles.original: でも声はもう気づいてる
subtitles.english: But my voice has already realized

subtitles.original: もっと高く 高く 高く 飛んでいける！
subtitles.english: I can fly higher, higher, and higher!

subtitles.original: 途切れ途切れの一縷でも
subtitles.english: Even if it's just a broken thread...

responses.thoughts:
**Final Subtitle Generation Thought Process**

Alright, let's get this done. I need to create a subtitle file, a JSON, for this video segment. It’s got to be precise, matching the Japanese audio with English translations. No fluff, just the facts, ma'am! I'll be working chronologically from 00:00 to 05:01.

First, I analyze the structure. From the beginning until roughly 03:13, it's MC talk time. Kazama Iroha is interacting, introducing herself, talking about the birthday theme ("Wind Trails"), etc. Then, at around 03:13, the song "Hakusen" starts. So, two distinct parts, I have to keep track of.

Now, let's transcribe. I'm noting everything, down to the breathing and pauses, from 00:00 to 03:13. Precision is key – I need those millisecond timings! I'm capturing the Japanese transcription (`og`), then I translate it to English (`en`). It’s critical, that the translation maintains the original meaning.

Next, I need to get the lyrics for "Hakusen" from 03:13 to the end. I'm going through it line by line, capturing the timing precisely. I'm paying special attention to vocal activations, and even background sounds are recorded here.

Alright, almost there! I'm now polishing those timestamps. I'll go through the transcriptions, making sure every vocal onset and offset has its spot within a millisecond. No overlaps, no weird timing. I need a clean and perfectly synchronized file.

Finally, I translate the Japanese lines into their English counterparts, making sure the meanings are accurately preserved.

Once I'm done, it's time to generate the `final_result` JSON and then, I'll execute the tool call. I'm ready!
